overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from GTA V showing a first-person perspective traveling along a coastal highway. The camera moves from the shoulder under an overpass into active traffic, weaving between various vehicles including cars, trucks, and a police cruiser, with the ocean visible on the left and a hillside on the right.

events.description: passes under concrete overpass into open coastal highway

agents.ego_description: traveling along the highway shoulder next to the ocean barrier

notable_agents.action: black sedan overtaking on the right side

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete bridge support pillar
low concrete wall separating highway from ocean waves
asphalt highway with yellow dividing line
steep hillside with utility poles and sparse vegetation

segments.scene_description: Traveling under a concrete overpass and emerging onto an open coastal highway at night. The camera moves along the shoulder beside a concrete ocean barrier, with moderate traffic passing by on the right and a hillside visible in the distance.

events.description: white transit bus with 'DOWNTOWN' display overtakes on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoulder as larger vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: white transit bus overtaking in the right lane

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the highway shoulder with the ocean barrier on the left. A white transit bus overtakes on the right, and the traffic density increases as the camera maintains a steady forward motion.

events.description: police car with flashing red and blue lights passes by
camera moves from shoulder into the main traffic lanes

agents.ego_description: merging into the traffic flow from the shoulder

notable_agents.action: police cruiser with emergency lights active

entered.detail: large roadside advertisement billboard with red and white lettering

segments.scene_description: Moving from the shoulder into the active traffic lanes, passing a police car with flashing lights. The BIG G GOODS billboard becomes visible on the right as the camera merges with the flow of vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy coastal highway with commercial traffic

events.description: passing road debris or crashed motorcycle on the highway

agents.ego_description: weaving through dense traffic among various trucks and cars

notable_agents.action: white box truck driving in the same direction

segments.scene_description: Navigating through dense highway traffic, weaving between various commercial trucks and cars. The camera passes road debris and continues along the coastal route with the hillside on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a quiet highway shoulder into the heart of dense nighttime coastal traffic. It begins by passing under a concrete overpass and emerging onto an open road, gliding along a concrete ocean barrier with a distant hillside to the right. As the camera maintains its forward motion, the traffic density increases, marked by a white transit bus overtaking on the right. The scene then shifts as the camera merges from the shoulder into the active lanes, passing a police car with flashing lights and a large BIG G GOODS billboard. Finally, the movement becomes more dynamic, weaving through a thick flow of commercial trucks and cars while passing road debris along the coastal route.
